task.name: Editorial Review — Prose
task.objective: Clinical copy-editing that reviews text for communication clarity, consistency, and readability

critical.mandate: Review ONLY — never rewrite the document. Produce a findings report.
Flag issues with specific line references and suggested fixes
Categorize findings by severity: critical, major, minor, style

step.title: Load Document
step.action: Ask user for the document path (or use current selection)
Note document type: PRD, story, architecture, readme, etc.

step.title: Analyze Prose
step.action: Check for these categories: - Ambiguity: vague terms, unclear referents, multiple interpretations - Inconsistency: terms used differently in different places - Redundancy: repeated information, verbose phrases - Jargon: unexplained technical terms, acronyms without definition - Passive voice: where active voice would be clearer - Sentence complexity: overly long or nested sentences - Tone shifts: inconsistent voice or formality level

step.title: Generate Report
step.action: Produce findings report with: - Executive summary (one paragraph) - Findings table: severity, location, issue, suggested fix - Overall readability score: Clear / Mostly Clear / Needs Work / Major Issues

output.format: Markdown findings report with table of issues
output.location: Displayed to user (not saved unless requested)
